heading: Presumption of death or detention
label: 1716 Presumption of death or detention
text: A determination that an individual is dead or a determination that he has been detained by a hostile force or person may be made on the basis of evidence that he has disappeared under circumstances such as to make such death or detention appear probable.
notes: Amendments1958— substituted “a hostile force or person” for “the enemy”.Pub. L. 85–608
Effective Date of 1958 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 85–608section 402 of Pub. L. 85–608section 1651 of this titleJune 30, 1958
